raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally file a complaint regarding the handling of a recent dispute I submitted through Citi Bank involving a {$700.00} charge from XXXX XXXX 

The charge in question was for a guided tour that was falsely advertised. The companys website provided misleading information about what the tour included, and upon discovering the discrepancies, I contacted the tour provider directly. Unfortunately, they failed to offer any reasonable resolution. 

Following this, I initiated a dispute through Citi Bank and made it clear that I had multiple forms of evidence supporting my claim. However, at no point was I contacted by Citi Bank to provide this documentation. The case was ultimately closed in favor of the merchant without affording me a fair opportunity to present my side or submit the evidence I mentioned. 

I am extremely disappointed with the lack of due diligence and communication throughout this process. I respectfully request that this matter be re-evaluated, and that I be allowed the opportunity to submit the supporting documentation to ensure a fair and transparent review of the dispute. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter
